title: Grilled Eastern Skewers with Broccoli
description: A flavorful and healthy meal featuring marinated eastern skewers grilled to perfection and served with steamed broccoli.

ingredients.name: Middle eastern spices
ingredients.notes: such as cumin, coriander, and sumac

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together garlicky oil, middle eastern spices, and 1 tbsp of xtra virgin olive oil.
Add the eastern skewers to the bowl and toss to coat.
Thread broccoli florets onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with xtra virgin olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the broccoli is tender and slightly charred.
